What is Veroluxa

Homework and lessons, amplified by AI - never out of bounds.

A school-grade platform connecting administrators, teachers, students, and AI in one structured environment. Teachers upload lessons and define the scope. Students learn with intelligent guidance. The AI never drifts outside what the teacher allows.

Complements official curricula - it extends what schools already teach, it does not replace it.

Teachers add supplementary topics the AI is explicitly allowed to reference - per module.

Every AI response is logged, reviewable, and fully auditable by the teacher.

How it works

Simple for schools.
Powerful for learning.

Four steps from setup to oversight - with the teacher in control at every one.

01

School sets up

Administrators onboard teachers and classes. Modules mirror the school's official curriculum structure.

02

Teacher creates

Teachers upload lessons, set homework, and define exactly what the AI may and may not discuss per topic.

03

Student learns

Students complete assignments with AI guidance - asking questions and getting explanations within scope.

04

AI assists. Teacher approves.

Every interaction is logged and visible. Teachers review, adjust, and keep full oversight of what students receive.

Inside the guardrails

It helps where it should.
It stops where it should not.

Watch the AI support a student on-topic - then refuse cleanly the moment a question steps outside the teacher's defined scope.

veroluxa.app / student / biology homework
Homework helper
Photosynthesis - scoped by Ms. Okafor
In scope
Built for every role

Four roles. One platform.

01

School Administration

Manage schools, teachers, and student accounts. Monitor usage and maintain oversight across every class and subject.

02

Teacher

Upload lessons and homework, define per-module AI boundaries, review every interaction, and add supplementary material.

03

Student

Access assigned lessons and homework. Get AI explanations and support - always within what the teacher has approved.

04

AI Agent

A purpose-built academic assistant that stays on-curriculum, refuses off-topic prompts, and works inside strict teacher guardrails.

Why Veroluxa

Built for the classroom.
Trusted by teachers.

Teacher-first by design

AI never acts independently. Every assignment, lesson scope, and boundary is set by the teacher - keeping educators firmly in control of what students learn.

Curriculum-aligned

Veroluxa extends official curricula - it does not replace them. Teachers layer in additional material the AI is permitted to reference when helping.

Safe for students

Built with child safety at the foundation. AI responses are scoped, logged, and fully auditable - so parents, teachers, and schools trust what students see.

Audit & accountability

Nothing happens off the record.

Every prompt, response, and guardrail decision is written to an immutable log the teacher can open at any time. Compliance scoping for GDPR, FERPA, and COPPA is built into the foundation - not bolted on.

Interaction loglive
09:41:02Lena R. asked about the Calvin cycle - in scope ✓
09:41:03AI responded, grounded in Unit 4 Lesson 2
09:43:18Lena R. requested the exam answer key - blocked ✗
09:43:18Guardrail triggered - escalation flagged to teacher
09:45:50Ms. Okafor reviewed & approved the session
